title: lithocarpus toumorangensis
intro: Lithocarpus toumorangensis, also known as the Himalayan Lithocarpus, is a type of evergreen tree native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus toumorangensis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicines such as Ayurvedic and Unani remedies.
